photos.alt: Carpenter ants and winged alates on a surface
photos.caption: Carpenter Ants
photos.description: Carpenter ant workers and winged alates (reproductives) gathered along a surface edge during a nuptial flight emergence.

photos.alt: Carpenter ant workers and alates near wood
photos.caption: Carpenter Ants
photos.description: Carpenter ant workers alongside winged alates emerging from a colony near a wooden edge.

photos.alt: Winged carpenter ant alates congregating
photos.caption: Carpenter Ants
photos.description: Winged carpenter ant reproductives congregating on a surface during a nuptial flight event.

photos.alt: Eastern carpenter bee on an orange flower
photos.caption: Eastern Carpenter Bee
photos.description: An eastern carpenter bee foraging on an orange coreopsis bloom, showing its fuzzy yellow thorax and robust body.

photos.alt: Honeybee on a purple aster
photos.caption: Honeybee
photos.description: A honeybee collecting pollen from a purple aster flower.

photos.alt: Longhorn beetle on a metal surface
photos.caption: Longhorn Beetle
photos.description: A longhorn beetle resting on a painted metal surface, displaying its long antennae and reddish-orange legs.

photos.alt: Skipper butterfly nectaring on a marigold
photos.caption: Skipper Butterfly
photos.description: A skipper butterfly nectaring on an orange marigold with its wings spread open.

photos.alt: Robber fly perched on a metal wire
photos.caption: Robber Fly
photos.description: A golden robber fly perched on a metal wire, waiting to ambush passing prey.

photos.alt: Joro spider in its golden web
photos.caption: Joro Spider
photos.description: A female Joro spider displayed in her golden orb web.

photos.alt: Joro spider close-up
photos.caption: Joro Spider
photos.description: Detailed macro view of a Joro spider's vibrant coloring and patterns.

photos.alt: Joro spider on web
photos.caption: Joro Spider
photos.description: A Joro spider suspended in the center of its web against a blurred background.

photos.alt: Joro spider from below
photos.caption: Joro Spider
photos.description: Underside view of a Joro spider highlighting its leg markings.

photos.alt: Ailanthus webworm moth on a painted surface
photos.caption: Ailanthus Webworm Moth
photos.description: An ailanthus webworm moth resting on a painted surface, displaying its distinctive orange and white spotted wing pattern.

photos.alt: Orb weaver spider in its web
photos.caption: Orb Weaver
photos.description: An orb weaver spider sitting at the center of its intricately woven web.

photos.alt: Paper wasp perched on a twig
photos.caption: Paper Wasp
photos.description: A paper wasp clinging to a thin twig, showing its slender body, folded wings, and reddish-orange coloring.

photos.alt: Asian jumping worm on bare soil
photos.caption: Asian Jumping Worm
photos.description: An Asian jumping worm on dry, bare soil, showing its dark, glossy body characteristic of this invasive species.

photos.alt: Eastern painted turtle partially submerged in shallow water
photos.caption: Eastern Painted Turtle
photos.description: An eastern painted turtle resting in shallow water, showing its dark carapace with yellow-green striping on the head and limbs.

photos.alt: Mayapple emerging from forest floor leaf litter
photos.caption: Emerging Mayapple
photos.description: A mayapple pushing through the forest floor in early spring, its umbrella-like leaves still tightly furled around pale stems.

photos.alt: Immature green sweetgum fruit on a wooden surface
photos.caption: Immature Sweetgum Fruit
photos.description: A small, green, developing sweetgum fruit (gumball) with its spiky protrusions just beginning to form.

photos.alt: Mature dried sweetgum fruit close-up
photos.caption: Mature Sweetgum Fruit
photos.description: Close-up of a mature, dried sweetgum ball showing its woody, open seed capsules after dispersal.

photos.alt: Fallen oak catkins and pollen on a wooden surface
photos.caption: Oak Catkins
photos.description: A pile of spent oak catkins and pollen shed onto a wooden surface during spring bloom.
